name: brainstorming
description: Structured approach to brainstorming and design. Guides users through clarifying questions, proposing approaches, and writing design docs. Includes a visual companion for sketching ideas.

interface.shortDescription: Use structured brainstorming and design workflows.
interface.longDescription: Clarify goals, explore solution approaches, compare tradeoffs, and produce design docs with optional visual sketching support.
defaultPrompt: Use brainstorming to explore approaches for this feature.
Use brainstorming to turn this idea into a design doc.
Use brainstorming to sketch and compare product directions.
